title: Bait discards a magic card as cost for sacrifice discount

card.rawText: Discard 1 magic card to the cemetery to play this card. For this turn, your creatures require 1 less sacrifice than normal.

effect.value: Discard 1 magic card to the cemetery to play this card. For this turn, your creatures require 1 less sacrifice than normal.

plan.title: Bait discards a magic card as cost for sacrifice discount
plan.summary: Play Bait and verify a magic card is discarded to cemetery before the temporary sacrifice discount is represented.

notes: Read text first: Discard 1 magic card to the cemetery to play this card. For this turn, your creatures require 1 less sacrifice than normal.

steps: Discard one magic card to cemetery as its play cost.
Verify the temporary one-less-sacrifice rule is represented.

expectedAssertions.label: A magic card was discarded for Bait

riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Play Bait and verify a magic card is discarded to cemetery before the temporary sacrifice discount is represented.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
